contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying, displaying the Microsoft Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to an interview setting where a man discusses the importance of high-quality data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology. He explains the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. The segment highlights the superior fidelity of cognitive services' offerings, emphasizing their human-like sound quality. The audio ends with a simulated air traffic control communication between Orlando ground and a flight requesting the end of pushback.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 4
transcriptPhrases.text: Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 4
transcriptPhrases.text: 9555 request to end pushback received.

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying, introducing the collaboration between Microsoft Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI. A man in a dark sweater speaks about the importance of good data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include audio waveforms representing the TTS process. Another man in a black sweater discusses the high fidelity and human-like quality of cognitive services' voice offerings. The scene transitions to various shots of landscapes, data centers, and detailed airplane models, highlighting the integration of AI and simulation technology. The segment ends with airport ground crew directing an Airbus plane, emphasizing realism and advanced technology in the simulation.

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying, displaying the Microsoft Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to an interview with a man discussing the importance of good data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology. He explains the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. The interview highlights the high fidelity and human-like quality of cognitive services' TTS offerings. Visuals include sound waveforms representing audio data and shots of data centers, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.
